name: startup_banner
checks: ASCII banner is horizontally centered within the terminal width
Subtitle 'Context Infrastructure for Agents' appears below the banner
Tab bar is visible and shows tab names
Active tab (Inbox) is visually highlighted or distinct
No raw ANSI escape codes visible as text

name: tab_bar_layout
checks: All 10 tab names are visible without truncation
Tab names are evenly spaced across the bar
Active tab is visually distinct from inactive tabs
Tab bar does not wrap to a second line
Tab bar separators or spacing is consistent

name: entity_table
checks: Table has a visible header row with column names
Table columns are evenly spaced and aligned
No text overflows its column boundary
Table is contained within a bordered box
Count line shows total number of entities

name: entity_table_focused
checks: One row in the table has a visible selection highlight
Selected row text is readable against the highlight background
Non-selected rows have normal styling
Table columns remain aligned with the header

name: entity_detail
checks: Detail view shows entity information in key-value format
Labels are visually distinct from values
Content is properly indented within the box
No text overflows the terminal width

name: entity_add_form
checks: Form fields are visible with labels
Input fields have clear boundaries or indicators
Form is contained within the content area
No overlapping text or UI elements

name: command_palette_open
checks: Command palette overlay is visible
Search input field has a cursor or prompt indicator
Palette has a border or visual boundary
Background content is still partially visible behind palette

name: command_palette_search
checks: Search query text is visible in the input field
Search results or filtered actions are displayed below input
Results have readable labels
No layout shift or overlap from search results

name: entities_tab_view
checks: Entities tab content area shows table or empty state
Tab bar indicates Entities as the active tab
Content area fills the available space below tab bar
No rendering artifacts at content boundaries

name: jobs_tab_view
checks: Jobs tab content area shows table or empty state
Tab bar indicates Jobs as the active tab
Content fills available space
No visual glitches at borders

name: context_tab_view
checks: Context tab shows content or empty state
Tab bar highlights Context tab
Layout is consistent with other tabs

name: settings_tab_view
checks: Settings/Profile tab shows configuration sections
API key, agents, and taxonomy sections are visible or labeled
Content is readable and properly spaced

name: search_results
checks: Search input shows the typed query
Results are displayed in a structured format
Mode indicator (text/semantic) is visible
Result count is shown

name: empty_state
checks: Empty state message is displayed when no data
Message is helpful and suggests next steps
Layout does not collapse or look broken with no data

name: relationships_tab
checks: Relationships tab renders without errors
Tab bar shows Relationships as active
Content area has proper boundaries
